questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "The film was so boring ___"
questions.answer: that I fell asleep.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "She is such a talented singer ___"
questions.answer: that everyone stood up to applaud.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "The food was so spicy ___"
questions.answer: that I had to drink three glasses of water.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "It was such terrible weather ___"
questions.answer: that we stayed indoors all day.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "They spoke so quietly ___"
questions.answer: that nobody could hear them.

questions.prompt: It was _____ a hot day that we went swimming.
questions.answer: such

questions.prompt: He speaks _____ fast that I can't understand him.
questions.answer: so

questions.prompt: They are _____ good friends that they tell each other everything.
questions.answer: such

questions.prompt: She was _____ tired that she fell asleep on the sofa.
questions.answer: so

questions.prompt: It was _____ bad news that she started to cry.
questions.answer: such

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "It was so a difficult exam that half the class failed."
questions.answer: 'so' cannot go before 'a'. Use 'such a': 'It was such a difficult exam'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "She is such beautiful that everyone looks at her."
questions.answer: Before an adjective alone, use 'so': 'She is so beautiful'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "The weather was so cold weather that we stayed inside."
questions.answer: Don't repeat the noun after 'so + adjective'. Use 'such cold weather' or just 'so cold'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "He told such funny jokes and everyone laughed."
questions.answer: Use 'that' not 'and' for the result clause: 'such funny jokes that everyone laughed'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "They drove so a long way that they were exhausted."
questions.answer: Before a noun phrase, use 'such a': 'such a long way'
She speaks so quickly that it's impossible to follow.
It was such a kind gesture that everyone was moved.
The party was so noisy that we couldn't sleep.
They gave such a terrible performance that all left.
He reads so fast that he can read a book in a day.
